name: configure-github-permissions
description: Interactively configure GitHub CLI (gh, including gh api) AND git command permissions in the project-local .claude/settings.local.json (not the committed .claude/settings.json) by asking the user category-by-category (17 categories × 3 choices: allow / ask / deny) which gh / git operation groups should be auto-allowed, prompt-on-use, or auto-denied. Destructive categories (gh merge, release, workflow exec, gh api, delete-class; git push, git reset --hard / restore / branch -D / clean -fd / stash drop) default to deny. git uses broad-allow + narrow-deny so safe sub-uses auto-execute while destructive ones stay blocked under the deny→ask→allow first-match-wins rule. Preserves existing entries, dedupes additions, and surfaces cross-array conflicts before writing.
